title: Debugging Obsidian Templater Daily Template
first_prompt: I need help debugging my Obsidian Templater template. I have a Daily Template in my Templates folder that calls two functions: moveUncompletedTasks and moveFleetingThoughts when it is invoked. It work
summary: Irwin was attempting to debug an Obsidian Templater Daily Template that was failing to execute two specific functions: `moveUncompletedTasks` and `moveFleetingThoughts`. After the assistant initially updated the script files, the user noted that the "Fleeting Thoughts" section displayed "undefined," leading the conversation to focus on the `moveFleetingThoughts` function. The discussion concluded with the assistant diagnosing a specific issue regarding the content transfer between the source and destination files.
